HOME.TITLE: Home
HOME.DESC: Find bus routes, track drivers and explore Lebanon's public transport network.
HOME.REAL_TIME_STOPS: Real-time stops. Flexible routes. Across Lebanon.
HOME.INFO_BANNER_TEXT: Buses in Lebanon stop anywhere along the route. Press ✋ to signal where you're waiting!
HOME.NO_ROUTES_FOUND:
No routes found.
Try a different search.

SPLASH.TITLE: Lebanon Bus Guide
SPLASH.DESC: Your complete guide to public transport in Lebanon.

ROLE.TITLE: Select Your Role
ROLE.DESC: Are you a passenger or a driver?

ROUTES.TITLE: Bus Routes
ROUTES.DESC: Explore all available bus routes across Lebanon.

MAP.TITLE: Live Bus Map
MAP.DESC: Track bus locations and find stops in real-time.
MAP.PICK_ROUTE: Select a route above to see live drivers
MAP.COMING_SUB: We're building a real-time map to show you exactly where every bus is and how long until it reaches you.
MAP.FEAT_LIVE: Live bus locations on the map

DRIVER_REG.TITLE: Driver Registration
DRIVER_REG.DESC: Join the Lebanon Bus network as a driver.

DASHBOARD.TITLE: Driver Dashboard
DASHBOARD.DESC: Manage your bus route and passenger signals.

WAITING.TITLE: I'm Waiting
WAITING.DESC: Signal your location to bus drivers nearby.
WAITING.HEADING: I'm Waiting
WAITING.SUBTITLE: Your location will be visible to drivers on your route for 2 hours.
WAITING.SIGNAL_SUB: Tap to share where you are
WAITING.TIP_DASHBOARD: Drivers will see you on their dashboard map
WAITING.TIP_EXPIRES: Your pin expires after 2 hours automatically
WAITING.TIP_STOP: Buses can stop anywhere — just wave them down!

REVIEW.TITLE: Submit Review
REVIEW.DESC: Share your feedback about your bus journey.

ONBOARDING.LANG_SUB: You can change this anytime in Settings.
ONBOARDING.THEME_SUB: Pick the look that feels right for you.
ONBOARDING.ROLE_TITLE: How will you use the app?
ONBOARDING.ROLE_SUB: You can change this anytime in Settings.
ONBOARDING.ROLE_PASSENGER_DESC: Find routes, signal drivers, leave reviews.
ONBOARDING.ROLE_DRIVER_DESC: Manage your route and see waiting passengers.
ONBOARDING.ROUTE_SUB: Optional — pick your most frequent route for quick access.

GEO_BANNER.PROMPT_TITLE: Allow location for the full experience
GEO_BANNER.PROMPT_BODY: See live bus drivers on the map, signal your stop, and get real-time updates. When prompted, tap "Allow" to enable location.
GEO_BANNER.DENIED_BODY: Go to your phone's Settings → Privacy → Location, and allow location for your browser. Then reload the app.
